display.purpose: Bricolage Grotesque — page heroes and large page titles only.

title.purpose: Compact top-bar titles, section heads, card titles.

label.purpose: Small-caps section labels and metadata only.

script.purpose: Great Vibes — co-brand signature flourishes only, never UI text.

shadows.name: dialog-dark
shadows.purpose: iOS-style themed alert dialogs on dark.

shadows.name: spring-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button btn-spring hover — the pink lift.

motion.name: ease-ios
motion.purpose: Smooth deceleration — sheets, dismissals, title handoff.

motion.name: ease-ios-spring
motion.purpose: Bouncy overshoot — toggle thumb, taps, icon hovers.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Co-brand pink CTA with spring-hover pink glow and active press.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:8px 16px; background:#FF1D8C; color:#fff; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:transform 220ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1), box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform:scale(1.06) translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 20px rgba(255,29,140,0.35); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform:scale(0.96); box-shadow:none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Transparent button, tints toward accent on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; gap:8px; height:40px; padding:8px 16px; background:transparent; color:#F0EEF5; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:14px; font-weight:500; border:none; border-radius:12px; cursor:pointer; transition:background 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background:rgba(240,238,245,0.08); }

components.name: Surface Card
components.description: Dark stacked surface card with hairline border and squircle corner.
components.css: .ds-surface-card { background:#0F0F12; color:#F0EEF5; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:22px; padding:16px; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; transition:transform 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease; } .ds-surface-card:hover { transform:translateY(-2px); box-shadow:0 6px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10); } .ds-surface-card h3 { margin:0 0 4px; font-size:17px; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-0.2px; } .ds-surface-card p { margin:0; font-size:15px; color:rgba(240,238,245,0.48); }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Hairline-bordered field with pink focus ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display:flex; width:100%; height:40px; padding:8px 12px; background:#070708; color:#F0EEF5; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:15px; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:12px; outline:none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color:rgba(240,238,245,0.55); } .ds-input:focus-visible { outline:2px solid #FF1D8C; outline-offset:2px; }

components.name: iOS Toggle
components.description: Exact UIKit 51x31 switch, system-green ON, spring thumb.
components.css: .ds-toggle { position:relative; display:inline-block; width:51px; height:31px; padding:0; border:none; border-radius:9999px; background:#34C759; cursor:pointer; box-sizing:border-box; transition:background 240ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-toggle[aria-checked="false"] { background:rgba(120,120,128,0.32); } .ds-toggle-thumb { position:absolute; top:2px; left:2px; width:27px; height:27px; border-radius:50%; background:#fff; box-shadow:0 3px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.15); transform:translateX(20px); transition:transform 240ms cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1); } .ds-toggle[aria-checked="false"] .ds-toggle-thumb { transform:translateX(0); }

components.name: iOS Group Row
components.description: Inset grouped list row, 44px min, hairline divider.
components.css: .ds-group { background:#0F0F12; border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.07); border-radius:22px; overflow:hidden; } .ds-group-row { position:relative; display:flex; align-items:center; gap:12px; min-height:44px; padding:11px 16px; width:100%; background:transparent; border:0; color:#F0EEF5; font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',system-ui,sans-serif; font-size:15px; text-align:left; cursor:pointer; transition:background 180ms cubic-bezier(0.32,0.72,0,1); } .ds-group-row + .ds-group-row::before { content:""; position:absolute; top:0; left:16px; right:16px; height:1px; background:rgba(255,255,255,0.07); } .ds-group-row:active { background:#161619; }

narrative.overview: Gainly is a near-black stage. The surface is quiet, almost theatrical dark (#070708), and color is the spotlight — it falls only on what earns it: a new PR, a status, the brand. The full rainbow lives in the system, but it is a vocabulary of meaning, not decoration. Two shells share one stage: a dark, immersive, motion-rich client PWA built for a thumb mid-workout, and a lighter, information-dense coach dashboard for scanning a roster at a glance. Same shape language, same accent system, same craft bar — different brightness because the jobs differ. It rejects sterile medical/clinical software and anything cheap or templated.
keyCharacteristics: Near-black base; saturated color reserved for meaning (PRs, status, brand).
Native-app feel: squircle corners, iOS easing, global press feedback, offline-first.
Two registers of one identity: dark immersive client app, lighter dense coach dashboard.
Expressive but disciplined motion that always respects reduced-motion.
Co-brand pink (#FF1D8C) as the signature accent across both shells.

rules.name: The Spotlight Rule
rules.body: Saturated color marks meaning, never fills space. If a color isn't reporting a status, a PR, or the brand, it doesn't belong. The black does the work; color is the exception.

rules.name: The Status-Color Lock
rules.body: Each rainbow hue has one job (green = good/synced, amber = caution, danger = red). Never reassign a status color for decoration; the coach scans by hue.

rules.name: The One Display Rule
rules.body: Bricolage Grotesque is the only display face. Don't introduce a second heading font; weight and size carry hierarchy.

rules.name: The Layer-Before-Shadow Rule
rules.body: On the dark stage, raise a surface by stepping its tone (Surface 1->2->3), not by adding a shadow. Shadows are for things that actually float (dialogs, hovers), nothing else.

dos: Do keep the client surface near-black (#070708) and let saturated color appear only as meaning — PRs, status, brand.
Do use continuous squircle corners on the client app; respect the radius scale (xs 8 -> 2xl 36).
Do raise dark surfaces by tonal layering (Surface 1->2->3), not by adding shadows.
Do ship press feedback, iOS easing, and a prefers-reduced-motion fallback for every animation.
Do pair every status color with an icon, label, or shape so color isn't the only signal.
Do keep contrast at WCAG AA — including muted/placeholder text on tinted near-black and near-white.
donts: Don't make Gainly feel like sterile medical/clinical software — no cold institutional grays, no patient-portal chill.
Don't let it look cheap or templated — no Bootstrap defaults, no off-the-shelf theme, no lazy identical card grids, no SaaS gradient hero-metric template.
Don't use color decoratively or reassign a status hue. Green means good/synced, amber means caution — always.
Don't add a second display font; Bricolage Grotesque is the only one.
Don't use Great Vibes (script) for anything but co-brand signature flourishes — never UI text.
Don't add border-left/border-right colored stripes, gradient text, or decorative glassmorphism.
Don't use hard, dark drop shadows; if a shadow looks like a 2014 app, it's too dark and too tight.
